decisions.what: Appended scroll reveal CSS rules to the end of styles.css
decisions.why: Placed after existing utilities to keep animation-specific rules grouped and maintain cascade order without disrupting existing styles

decisions.what: Appended Intersection Observer logic after the existing form submit handler in script.js
decisions.why: Specification explicitly stated 'after existing code'; keeps scroll reveal logic independent from form logic

decisions.what: Added data-reveal attribute to <section class='social-proof'> and <footer>
decisions.why: Both elements are below the fold as required by the specification, enabling the observer to trigger reveal on scroll
